details.productUrlName: FAS BOR7 Horus Blightsteel Colossus Rainbow Foil

customAttributes.description:
Secret Lair x Horizon: Into the Forbidden West

Trample, infect, indestructible
If FAS-BOR7 Horus would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, reveal FAS-BOR7 Horus and shuffle it into its owner's library instead.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in Secret Lair x Horizon: Into the Forbidden West and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 11/13/2025 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText:
“Your complete engagement ecosystem comprehensively managed by a high-speed learning machine network.”
—Faro Sales Dept.
